auth_subtitle: Explore daily menus from your favorite restaurants. Filter by distance or price and book your table today.
auth_body_subtitle: Discover the daily menus of bars and restaurants near you — no calls, no searching, no detours.
auth_no_account: Don't have an account? Sign up
auth_has_account: Already have an account? Log in
auth_accept_terms_prefix: By signing up you accept the
auth_password_letter: Must contain at least one letter
auth_password_number: Must contain at least one number
auth_welcome_subtitle: Tell us a bit more to set up your account.
auth_how_use: How do you want to use Zampa?
auth_diner_desc: I browse menus and find nearby restaurants.
auth_restaurant_desc: I publish my daily menu and attract more customers.
account_deletion_date: Your account will be deleted on
account_deletion_recover_hint: If you want to keep it, tap Recover account.
feed_no_results: No menus found with these filters
detail_how_to_go: How do you want to get there?
detail_share_text: Check out this menu on Zampa:
location_subtitle: Enable location permissions to show you the best daily menus sorted by distance.
location_disclaimer: Your location will only be shared for this purpose.
favorites_empty_desc: Save your favorite restaurants to get notified when they publish their daily menus.
profile_delete_body: This action will schedule the permanent deletion of your account in 30 days. During that time you can recover it by logging in. After the deadline, the following will be deleted forever:
dietary_footer: Offers that don't match your preferences will be automatically hidden from the feed. Offers without dietary information are always shown.
notif_new_offers_desc: Get a notification when a favorite restaurant publishes a new daily menu or dish of the day
notif_pro_desc: Restaurants with a Pro subscription automatically send notifications to their followers every time they publish a new offer.
currency_footer: Prices are always charged in euros. This option only changes how they are displayed in the app.
merchant_no_menus: You haven't published any menus yet
merchant_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this offer? Customers will no longer be able to see it.
merchant_delete_selected_body: This action will delete the selected menus. This cannot be undone.
create_menu_permanent_hint: 'Permanent offer' requires Pro Plan — does not expire after 24h
create_menu_recurring_days_all_occupied: All days are occupied. Edit or delete a permanent offer to free up days.
create_menu_limit_body: Upgrade to Pro to publish unlimited menus.
setup_create_subtitle: Set up your restaurant to start publishing daily menus.
setup_address_error: Could not verify the address. Make sure it is correct and includes city and country.
subscription_subtitle: Make your business stand out and attract more customers with exclusive tools.
subscription_subtitle_alt_desc: Attract more customers and stand out from the competition with exclusive tools.
subscription_already_pro_alt: You're already Pro! Thanks for your support.
subscription_thanks: Your subscription is active. Thank you for trusting Zampa.
subscription_coming_soon_ios: We are integrating App Store in-app payments. You'll be able to subscribe to Zampa Pro from the app very soon.
subscription_coming_soon_android: We are integrating Google Play in-app payments. You'll be able to subscribe to Zampa Pro from the app very soon.
legal_privacy_1_body: SOZOLAB S.L. is the entity responsible for processing the personal data collected through the Zampa application.
legal_privacy_2_body: We collect the data you provide when you sign up (name, email address, phone number), app usage data, your approximate location to show nearby restaurants (only while the app is in use and with your permission), and the device token for sending push notifications.
legal_privacy_3_body:
We use your data to:
• Manage your account and authentication.
• Show you nearby dining offers.
• Send you notifications about new menus from your favorite restaurants (only if you allow it).
• Improve the service through aggregated and anonymous analysis.
legal_privacy_4_body: Processing is based on the performance of the contract for use of the application (Art. 6.1.b GDPR) and, in the case of push notifications, on your explicit consent (Art. 6.1.a GDPR).
legal_privacy_5_body: We retain your data as long as your account remains active. You can request the deletion of your account and data at any time.
legal_privacy_6_body: You have the right to access, rectify, delete, restrict, or object to the processing of your data, as well as the right to data portability. You can exercise these rights by writing to soporte@getzampa.com.
legal_privacy_7_body: For any privacy-related inquiries, write to us at soporte@getzampa.com.
legal_terms_1_body: By using Zampa you accept these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree, do not use the application.
legal_terms_2_body: Zampa is a platform that connects hospitality businesses ("merchants") with customers looking for daily menu deals and special dishes. Merchants are responsible for the accuracy of their listings.
legal_terms_3_body: You must be at least 16 years old to sign up. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your password. Notify us immediately if you detect unauthorized use of your account.
legal_terms_4_body: Prices, descriptions, schedules, and menu availability are the sole responsibility of each merchant. Zampa does not guarantee the availability of any published offer.
legal_terms_5_body:
The following is prohibited:
• Publishing false or misleading information.
• Using the platform for illegal activities.
• Attempting to access other users' data.
• Scraping or automating mass access to the platform.
legal_terms_6_body: The design, code, and brand of Zampa are the property of SOZOLAB S.L. Content published by merchants (photos, descriptions) is the property of their respective owners.
legal_terms_7_body: Zampa acts as an intermediary. We are not responsible for the quality of food, errors in prices published by merchants, or issues arising from the use of third-party services.
legal_terms_8_body: We may update these terms at any time. We will notify you of significant changes through the app.
legal_terms_9_body: For any inquiries, write to us at soporte@getzampa.com.
favorites_subtitle: We'll notify you when these restaurants publish new offers.
setup_tax_id_hint: Needed to verify this is a real restaurant
map_no_locations: No restaurants with a location to show on the map
subscription_promo_body: Enjoy all features at no cost until %@.
subscription_trial_ends_today: Last day of your free trial
subscription_expired_body: Subscribe to keep publishing offers. Your profile stays visible to customers.
subscription_required_error: You need an active subscription to publish. Start or renew your subscription.
